---
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# LTCH

```{r setup}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
#| cache: false
#| comment: ""
library(ccn)
source("code/gt_theme.R")
```

## Long-Term Care Hospitals (LTCH)

```{r}
#| label: ltch
#| echo: false
#| message: false
x <- ccn:::get_pin("ltch")
x |>
  head(50) |> 
  gt::gt() |> 
  gtExtras::gt_theme_nytimes() |> 
  gt::tab_options(
    table.width = gt::pct(100),
    quarto.disable_processing = TRUE
  )
```
